# Macimorelin Acetate 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Macimorelin Acetate 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Macimorelin Acetate</strong> 目前有 <strong>19 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Macimorelin Acetate 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：This medicinal product is for diagnostic use only.&nbsp;GHRYVELIN&nbsp;is indicated for the diagnosis of growth hormone deficiency (GHD) in adults.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>hypertrichosis (disease)（98.3%）</li>
<li>Ambras type hypertrichosis universalis congenita（97.9%）</li>
<li>malformation syndrome with odontal and/or periodontal component（97.8%）</li>
<li>syndrome with a Dandy-Walker malformation as major feature（97.8%）</li>
<li>isolated genetic hair shaft abnormality（97.7%）</li>
<li>allergic urticaria（94.0%）</li>
<li>anomalous left coronary artery from the pulmonary artery（90.3%）</li>
<li>myocardial ischemia（89.8%）</li>
<li>cold urticaria（89.8%）</li>
<li>coronary artery disease（89.0%）</li>
<li>nephrogenic syndrome of inappropriate antidiuresis（87.0%）</li>
<li>familial isolated trichomegaly（86.8%）</li>
<li>mycotic corneal ulcer（83.4%）</li>
<li>papillary conjunctivitis（80.6%）</li>
<li>chronic thromboembolic pulmonary hypertension（80.4%）</li>
<li>recalcitrant atopic dermatitis（80.2%）</li>
<li>uterine polyp（80.1%）</li>
<li>lissencephaly（80.1%）</li>
<li>polyp of vocal cord（80.0%）</li>
<li>polyp of middle ear（79.9%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/macimorelin-acetate/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
